pattern: Always safeParse FIRST in Server Actions before any auth check or DB call — prevents leaking auth status to unauthenticated callers
Compensating saga for DB+HTTP: insert record → try external call → on failure delete the record. True atomicity impossible across DB+HTTP.
example: src/lib/actions/auth.ts — inviteUser: INSERT invitation → resend.send → catch: DELETE invitation

pattern: All org-scoped DB queries use queryForOrg(orgId, userId, sql, params) — never raw query() for org data
Auth forms: 'use client' + react-hook-form + zodResolver(schema). Login uses NextAuth signIn('credentials'), not a Server Action. Signup/invite use Server Actions.
Vitest coverage include: ['src/**'] to exclude scripts/. Exclude: db/**, auth.ts, utils.ts, ui/**, api/**, layouts, pages, middleware, test files.
